summary: Tested Pet Life OS iteration 214 - Pawrent Journey feature. Fixed critical backend routing bug: pawrent-journey endpoints were defined after app.include_router(api_router) and never registered. Fixed by creating separate pawrent_journey_router. All 7 backend tests now pass. Frontend features verified via Playwright: /pawrent-journey route, PawrentJourneyCard on PetHomePage, Pawrent Journey in mobile menu, /go /play /care pages load without errors.

critical.issue: Routes defined in api_router AFTER app.include_router(api_router) at line 21921 — FastAPI copies routes at include time so these were never registered. Returns 404 for all calls. FIXED: Created separate pawrent_journey_router with app.include_router(pawrent_journey_router) at end of file.

minor.issue: Line 24435 has bare 'all_allergies' expression with no assignment and no return statement — will raise NameError when called. Endpoint is actually served by birthday_box_routes.py but duplicate in server.py is dead code.

integration_issues.issue: Console error 'Failed to fetch pets: TypeError: Failed to fetch' appears on several pages after login — pre-existing issue, not from this iteration

action_items: Fix bare 'all_allergies' expression at server.py line 24435 inside build_birthday_box — function has no return and will NameError at runtime

Review all api_router decorators defined after line 21921 to ensure they are dead code duplicates (birthday-box, analytics etc.) and not missing routes — e.g. admin/renewals endpoints at lines 23823-23844 return 404
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: server.py - pawrent journey endpoints at lines 24440-24453 were added to api_router AFTER app.include_router(api_router) at line 21921. FastAPI copies routes at include_router time, so these were never registered. Moved to dedicated pawrent_journey_router with proper include_router call.

CRITICAL CODE SMELL: server.py has 24000+ lines with app.include_router(api_router) at line 21921, but route decorators continue until line 24459. Any new @api_router route added after line 21921 will silently fail (404). Recommend moving all new routes to separate router files.

Minor: server.py line 24435 - bare 'all_allergies' expression inside build_birthday_box function — missing assignment and return statement. Will cause NameError when POST /api/birthday-box/{pet_id}/build is called (but this endpoint is actually served by birthday_box_routes.py).
seed_data_creation: Test steps added to pawrent_journey_progress collection during testing (pet-mojo-7327ad56)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pawrent Journey feature fully implemented and working. Backend fix applied: separate pawrent_journey_router created. Two endpoints work: GET /api/pawrent-journey/progress/{pet_id} and POST /api/pawrent-journey/complete-step. Frontend: /pawrent-journey route shows mode tabs, PawrentJourneyCard visible on PetHomePage, Pawrent Journey in mobile menu. /go, /play, /care pages all load without JSX errors.

backend_endpoints.GET /api/pawrent-journey/progress/{pet_i: PASS - returns {completed_steps: []} for new pet, returns array with completed steps after POST
backend_endpoints.POST /api/pawrent-journey/complete-step: PASS - returns {ok: true}, persists step to MongoDB

frontend_features./go page (mobile): PASS - loads without JSX parsing errors
frontend_features./play page (mobile): PASS - loads without JSX parsing errors
frontend_features./care page (mobile): PASS - loads without errors, no blank page
frontend_features./pawrent-journey route: PASS - shows 'The Pawrent Journey' with 4 mode tabs: Considering, Welcome Home, Growing Together, Always There
frontend_features.PetHomePage PawrentJourneyCard: PASS - visible below 'See Picks for Mojo' button with PAWRENT JOURNEY label
frontend_features.Mobile menu Pawrent Journey: PASS - 'Pawrent Journey' link present with data-testid, navigates to /pawrent-journey
frontend_features.Services mobile Explore via Concierge: PASS - ServicesMobilePage.jsx line 142 has 'Explore all {group.label} via Concierge® →'

rca_of_issue: Root cause: In FastAPI, when app.include_router(router) is called, all routes currently registered on that router are copied into the app. Any @router.route decorators applied AFTER the include_router call are added to the router object but NOT to the app, resulting in 404 responses. server.py has app.include_router(api_router) at line 21921 but new pawrent-journey routes were added to api_router at lines 24440-24453 (after line 21921). Fix: Create a new APIRouter, define the endpoints there, and call app.include_router after all definitions.
